title: A for loop update clause should move the counter in the right direction
description: A "for" loop update clause should move the counter in the right directionAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBugWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoAforloop with a counter that moves in the wrong direction, away from the stop condition, is not an infinite loop. Because ofwraparound, the loop will eventually reach its stop condition, but in doing so, it will probably run more times than anticipated, potentially causing unexpected behavior.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
